% cv-skills.tex (tagged) — \cvskillbar + \cvskillgroup, then \cvskillbubbles.
% Generated by stklug84/actions cv/parse — do not edit by hand.
% Per skill group: a \cvskillbar (fraction from `size`, aligned to the group
% name) followed by the comma-joined item list via \cvskillgroup. The
% optional `concepts` section is rendered last as a \cvskillbubbles row,
% each bubble weighted by its `size`.
%
% \cvskillbubbles uses `;` (label/weight) and `,` (pair separator) as
% structural delimiters, so a bubble LABEL must contain neither; we
% sanitise those two characters to spaces. Slashes are fine and kept
% verbatim (e.g. "Parallel/Scientific Computing").
\cvskillbar{Cloud}{0.8}
\cvskillgroup{Cloud}{Azure, Landing Zones, Networking, Identity}
\cvskillbar{IaC \& Delivery}{0.6}
\cvskillgroup{IaC \& Delivery}{Bicep, Terraform, GitHub Actions}
\cvskillbubbles{MLOps;8, Knowledge Graphs;6}
